package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for validator_outside_validation_package: Reusable validators that are scattered across handlers instead of living in a dedicated validation helper package.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule219NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule219NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule219NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario219Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule219NegativeService, input Rule219NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
